best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-configuration-001 title: verify configuration settings module: configuration source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: min_age = 18, min_length_password = 8, api_link = "http://example.com/api" test steps: 1. set min_age to 18 2. set min_length_password to 8 3. set api_link to "http://example.com/api" expected result: configuration settings should be successfully updated.

test case id: tc-notificationsystem-001 title: verify notification system operations module: notificationsystem source pages: 1 preconditions: configuration settings are valid test data: report with id = 1, postdate = "2023-10-01", title = "test report", priority = 1, category = "general", address = "123 main st", creator = "john doe" test steps: 1. create a new report object 2. call start() method 3. call downloadreports() method 4. call elaboratedata([report]) method 5. call sendnotificationreport(report) method 6. call shownotificationwithdefaultsound("test report", "report received", true) method expected result: notification system should handle the report correctly and send notifications as expected.

test case id: tc-readlist-001 title: verify reading and displaying list of services/needs/reports module: data retrieval source pages: 3 preconditions: configuration settings are valid test data: json list of services/needs/reports test steps: 1. send request to api_manager for json list 2. create new service/need/report for each entry in the json list 3. display list of services/needs/reports expected result: list of services/needs/reports should be displayed correctly.

test case id: tc-localuser-001 title: verify local user operations module: localuser source pages: 1 preconditions: configuration settings are valid test data: localuser with email = "john.doe@example.com", username = "johndoe", name = "john", lastname = "doe", birthdate = "1990-01-01", address = "123 main st", family = 4, housetype = "apartment", neighborhood = "downtown" test steps: 1. create a new localuser object 2. set email to "john.doe@example.com" 3. set username to "johndoe" 4. set name to "john" 5. set lastname to "doe" 6. set birthdate to "1990-01-01" 7. set address to "123 main st" 8. set family to 4 9. set housetype to "apartment" 10. set neighborhood to "downtown" 11. call tojson() method expected result: localuser object should be created and serialized correctly.

test case id: tc-service-001 title: verify service operations module: service source pages: 1 preconditions: configuration settings are valid test data: service with id = 1, postdate = "2023-10-01", title = "test service", link = "http://example.com/service", description = "this is a test service", creator = "jane doe" test steps: 1. create a new service object 2. set id to 1 3. set postdate to "2023-10-01" 4. set title to "test service" 5. set link to "http://example.com/service" 6. set description to "this is a test service" 7. set creator to "jane doe" 8. call tojson() method expected result: service object should be created and serialized correctly.

test case id: tc-api_manager-001 title: verify api manager operations module: api_manager source pages: 1,2,3,4,5 preconditions: configuration settings are valid test data: token = "abc123" test steps: 1. retrieve token from localuser 2. request data using token 3. check if status is ok 4. if status is not ok, request user data 5. create new localuser instance 6. complete action expected result: api manager should handle token validation and data requests correctly.
